subcodes.first_line: O delicate and cherished fruit of the Tree of Divine Unity, render thanks unto the Peerless Lord, that from the crystal spring of Tasnim thou art sustained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره جنیه لطیفه شجره احدیت شکر کن حضرت بیمثال را که از عین تسنیم و سلسال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @light and darkness, @love as fire, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
